fixed_versions:
Before applying this update, make sure all previously released errata relevant to your system have been applied.
For details on how to apply this update, refer to: https://access.redhat.com/articles/11258
mitigations: To mitigate this issue, implement strict input validation before passing any property paths to the _.unset and _.omit functions to block attempts to access the prototype chain. Ensure that strings like __proto__, constructor and prototype are blocked, for example.

title: Red Hat Security Advisory: Cluster Observability Operator 1.4.0
